North Texas Healthcare Academy

Real instructors. Real clinical practice. A real shot at a healthcare career.

Six hands-on certification programs — CNA, Phlebotomy, EKG, Medical Assistant, Patient Care, and Medical Billing & Coding — led by people who still work in the field.

Explore programs Talk to admissions

Every class here is taught by someone who's worked the floor — not just a textbook. You'll train hands-on, ask real questions, and leave with skills an employer can actually use.

Life at the Academy

A look at what your classroom days actually look like.

Find your program

Every program pairs classroom instruction with real clinical practice and an instructor who's done the job.

Certified Nursing Assistant

4–6 weeks

Foundational patient care and clinical hours, with state exam prep.

Learn more →

Phlebotomy Technician

6–8 weeks

Venipuncture and specimen handling under supervised practice.

Learn more →

EKG Technician

4 weeks

Cardiac monitoring fundamentals — our shortest path to a credential.

Learn more →

Medical Assistant

12–16 weeks

Clinical and front-office training for the broadest job market.

Learn more →

Patient Care Technician

8–10 weeks

Stacks CNA, phlebotomy, and EKG skills into one credential.

Learn more →

Medical Billing & Coding

12 weeks

Coding systems and claims — the one program you can finish from home.

Learn more →
